---
title: "Group work on your project"
subtitle: "27 April 2026"
format: html
---

## Reading
- Quinn Dombrowski, "Minimizing Computing Maximizes Labor," *Digital Humanities Quarterly* 16, no. 2 (2022), <https://doi.org/10.63744/nkueftfvhghb>.

## Assignment
- Make progress on your final project and come to class with questions or ideas.

## Activities
- Discussion: Digital history and minimal computing.
- Overview of Quarto websites and git, GitHub workflow.
- Time to work and help each other on final projects.

## Resources
- Check out the [example Quarto website](https://jessesadler.github.io/quarto-web-example/) and the [site's GitHub repository](https://github.com/jessesadler/quarto-web-example) that shows how it is made.
- Use [Resources: Quarto websites](../resources/quarto-websites.qmd) and the [Quarto website documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/websites/).
- [Resources: Citations with Quarto](../resources/quarto-citations.qmd)
- [Resources: Licensing and open access](../resources/oa-license.qmd)
